creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Heino Tiedemann wrote on 31.03.2012 12:44:
> Hi Ruslan,
>
>
> today I got this:
>
> cd /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine&&  /usr/bin/c++   -DBZIP_SUPPORT -DMYFILE_MMAP -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -fPIC -O3 -ffast-math -fexpensive-optimizations -funroll-loops -msse -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -fPIC  -O3 -ffast-math -fexpensive-optimizations  -funroll-loops -msse  -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -fPIC -O3 -ffast-math -fexpensive-optimizations -funroll-loops -msse -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -fPIC  -O3 -ffast-math -fexpensive-opti mizations  -funroll-loops -msse -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/glibmm-2.4 -I/usr/local/lib/glibmm-2.4/include -I/usr/local/include/sigc++-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/sigc++-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/libiptcdata -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/gtkmm-2.4 -I/usr/local/lib/gtkmm-2.4/include -I/usr/local/include/atkmm-1.6 -I/usr/local/include/giomm-2.4 -I/usr/local/lib/giomm-2.4/include -I/usr/local/include/pangomm-1.4 -I/usr/local/lib/pangomm-1.4/in
 clude -I/
usr/local/include/gtk-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/gtk-unix-print-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/gdkmm-2.4 -I/usr/local/lib/gdkmm-2.4/include -I/usr/local/include/atk-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/cairomm-1.0 -I/usr/local/lib/cairomm-1.0/include -I/usr/local/include/pango-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/cairo -I/usr/local/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include/libpng -I/usr/local/lib/gtk-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/gdk-pixbuf-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/gio-unix-2.0 -ffast-math -funroll-loops -o  CMakeFiles/rtengine.dir/ipresize.cc.o -c /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/ipresize.cc
> In file included from /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/ipresize.cc:20:
> /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/improcfun.h:21:13: warning: extra tokens at end of #ifndef directive
> In file included from /usr/include/c++/4.2/cmath:54,
>                   from /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/../rtexif/rtexif.h:28,
>                   from /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/rtengine.h:28,
>                   from /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/imageio.h:30,
>                   from /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/imagefloat.h:25,
>                   from /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/improcfun.h:25,
>                   from /usr/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/work/rawtherapee-4.0.7/rtengine/ipresize.cc:20:

Hi!

Yes, it was just fixed couple of minutes ago:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/graphics/rawtherapee/files/patch-rtengine_improcfun.h.diff?r1=1.1;r2=1.2

Please update your ports tree and try again (it may took some time to 
propagate via portsnap). Thank you.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
